segments.text: Hear, ye children, the instruction of a father, and attend to know understanding.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For I give you good doctrine, forsake ye not my law.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For I was my father's son, tender and only beloved in the sight of my mother.
He taught me also, and said unto me,
Let thine heart retain my words: keep my commandments, and live.
segments.speaker: Solomon's Father

segments.text: Get wisdom, get understanding: forget it not; neither decline from the words of my mouth.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Forsake her not, and she shall preserve thee: love her, and she shall keep thee.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Wisdom is the principal thing; therefore get wisdom: and with all thy getting get understanding.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Exalt her, and she shall promote thee: she shall bring thee to honour, when thou dost embrace her.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: She shall give to thine head an ornament of grace: a crown of glory shall she deliver to thee.
segments.speaker: Solomon

footnotes: a crown…: or, she shall compass thee with a crown of glory

segments.text: Hear, O my son, and receive my sayings; and the years of thy life shall be many.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: I have taught thee in the way of wisdom; I have led thee in right paths.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: When thou goest, thy steps shall not be straitened; and when thou runnest, thou shalt not stumble.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Take fast hold of instruction; let her not go: keep her; for she is thy life.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Enter not into the path of the wicked, and go not in the way of evil men.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Avoid it, pass not by it, turn from it, and pass away.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For they sleep not, except they have done mischief; and their sleep is taken away, unless they cause some to fall.
For they eat the bread of wickedness, and drink the wine of violence.
But the path of the just is as the shining light, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day.
The way of the wicked is as darkness: they know not at what they stumble.
My son, attend to my words; incline thine ear unto my sayings.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Let them not depart from thine eyes; keep them in the midst of thine heart.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For they are life unto those that find them, and health to all their flesh.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Keep thy heart with all diligence; for out of it are the issues of life.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Put away from thee a froward mouth, and perverse lips put far from thee.
segments.speaker: Solomon

footnotes: a froward…: Heb. frowardness of mouth and perverseness of lips

segments.text: Let thine eyes look right on, and let thine eyelids look straight before thee.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Ponder the path of thy feet, and let all thy ways be established.
segments.speaker: Solomon

footnotes: let…: or, all thy ways shall be ordered aright

segments.text: Turn not to the right hand nor to the left: remove thy foot from evil.
segments.speaker: Solomon
